title: Chapter 6, Section 1 — Salary Of Governor
text: The governor shall receive a salary of $140,535, and an additional amount to be calculated by applying the adjustment percentage most recently ascertained by the governor pursuant to Article CXVIII of the Articles of Amendment to the Constitution to the preceding figure.
chapter_name: The Governor, Lieutenant Governor And Council, Certain Officers Under The Governor And Council, And State Library
title_name: Executive And Administrative Officers Of The Commonwealth
